//1: When you override this file you REPLACE vanilla's preset entirely; the dimensions map must list ALL three dimensions.
//2: If you only customise the overworld, the Nether and End stanzas below MUST be present verbatim — leaving them out silently breaks those dimensions (the IsekaiValidator world-preset check warns about this on server start).
//3: Swap the overworld block to point at YOUR generator/biome_source/settings; keep Nether and End untouched unless you're also customising them.

biome_source.//: YOUR biome source — e.g. isekai_api:rule with BiomeZones, or isekai_api:climate_zones, or a custom multi_noise list.

settings.//: YOUR noise_settings key — either minecraft:overworld (vanilla) or your namespace's noise_settings.

minecraft:the_nether.//: VERBATIM vanilla Nether. Do not edit unless you're customising the Nether.

minecraft:the_end.//: VERBATIM vanilla End. Do not edit unless you're customising the End.
